title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password to verify successful authentication returns 200 status with JWT token and coach profile data.

title: postapiauthregisterwithnewcoachdetails
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with valid new coach details to ensure account creation returns 201 status and sends verification email.

title: getapiauthmewithvalidjwttoken
description: Test GET /api/auth/me with a valid JWT token to confirm retrieval of authenticated coach profile with decrypted personal information.

title: putapiauthmeupdateprofilefields
description: Test PUT /api/auth/me with updated profile fields to verify successful profile update returns 200 status with updated data.

title: postapiauthchangepasswordwithvalidcurrentandnewpassword
description: Test POST /api/auth/change-password with correct currentPassword and newPassword to confirm password update returns success message.

title: postapiauthforgotpasswordwithregisteredemail
description: Test POST /api/auth/forgot-password with a registered email to verify password reset email is sent and returns 200 status.

title: getapihealthcheck
description: Test GET /api/health to verify the API health check endpoint returns 200 with success message and timestamp. Public endpoint, no auth required.

title: getapiexerciseslist
description: Test GET /api/exercises to verify the exercises endpoint returns 200 with a list of exercises. Public endpoint, no auth required.

title: getapirecipeslist
description: Test GET /api/recipes to verify the recipes endpoint returns 200 with a list of recipes. Public endpoint, no auth required.

title: getapirecipesstats
description: Test GET /api/recipes/stats to verify the recipe statistics endpoint returns 200 with aggregate data. Public endpoint, no auth required.

title: getapiclientswithauth
description: Test GET /api/clients with a valid JWT token to verify the clients list endpoint returns 200 with client data and metadata.

title: getapistatswithauth
description: Test GET /api/stats with a valid JWT token to verify the dashboard statistics endpoint returns 200 with clientCount, recipeCount and other stats.
